summary: Plan #59920 as the canonical repairable contributor PR. Current main at 70489061cab62786b794ac593f85933b3ade2063 still lacks terminal-field preference in the generic CLI JSONL parser, and the hydrated PR state shows #59920 is open, clean, maintainer-editable, narrow, and already has passing checks, but it still needs a final branch repair/review proof path before any future merge. No GitHub mutations are planned here because comments, close, labels, merge, force-push, and bypasses are blocked.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #59920 in place so the CLI JSONL parser and streaming parser prefer explicit terminal reply semantics without regressing commentary-only structured output into raw JSONL fallback.
repair_candidate.pr_title: [codex] prefer terminal reply fields in CLI JSONL parser
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #59920 in place so `parseCliJsonl()` and `createCliJsonlStreamingParser().getOutput()` prefer `task_complete.last_agent_message`, then `phase:"final_answer"`, then non-commentary generic message text.
- Preserve structured empty output for commentary-only successful JSONL so `parseCliOutput()` does not fall back to raw JSONL blobs.
- Keep the patch limited to `src/agents/cli-output.ts` and parser regression coverage in `src/agents/cli-output.test.ts`.

## Credit
This continues @mySebbe's original parser fix from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/59920 and the report in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/59918.

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/agents/cli-output.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Fresh Codex `/review` / autoreview before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve @mySebbe as the original contributor/reporter via the existing #59920 branch and commits.
Keep existing Clownfish/openclaw-clownfish repair commit context; do not replace the PR unless branch update becomes unsafe.
Mention source issue #59918 and PR #59920 in release-note context because the behavior affects user-visible channel replies.
